description: The existing 10,365-LOC desktop-studio prototype at `wrkstrm-app/private/apple/prototypes/desktop-studio/shared/Sources/Plugins/DesktopStudioPluginCatalog.swift` declares 5 plugins as Swift literals. Operator pivot from this session: 'we shouldn't have enums defining this because it's a huge ecosystem; a bundle identifier might make more sense.' Refactor the catalog to scan known paths for `*.studio-plugin.json` files conforming to DesktopStudioPluginDescriptor (now defined in desktop-studio-plugin-schemas v0.1.0). Each contributing app drops its plugin descriptor; the studio loads them dynamically. Adds release-aware behavior without recompiling the host every time a new app wants to register.
title: Refactor DesktopStudioPluginCatalog static enum to JSON loader (consume desktop-studio-plugin-schemas)
